name: Monday.com
description: Monday.com — Work OS platform for project management with customizable boards, automations, and a REST API.

seo.title: Monday.com — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Monday.com: Monday.com — Work OS platform for project management with customizable boards, automations, and a REST API.

when_to_use: Project management board with custom automation rules
No-code CRM built on Monday.com boards for a small team
Client onboarding workflow with status tracking and forms
Cross-team sprint planning with integrated REST API sync
Content calendar managing tasks and deadlines per channel

pros: Mature REST API and apps framework
cons: Feature sprawl can confuse new users
review.verdict: A polished Work OS that scales from team tasks to ops platforms — if you can stomach the per-seat bill.
review.best_for: Mid-market ops teams wanting a visual Work OS with strong automations and integrations
review.not_for: Cost-sensitive startups or engineering teams preferring Linear or GitHub Projects
